name: BCB BANCORP INC
business: BCB Bancorp, Inc. is a bank holding company that offers FDIC-insured deposit products and invests in loans and investment securities. It provides a range of loan products including commercial and multi-family real estate loans, residential mortgages, commercial business loans, construction loans, home equity loans, and consumer loans. Its deposit products include savings, checking, money market, and certificates of deposit, along with retail and commercial banking services such as online banking and fraud detection.
sellsTo: Individuals and businesses in New Jersey (Bergen, Essex, Middlesex, Hudson, Monmouth, Morris, Union counties) and New York (Staten Island and Hicksville)
Community-oriented customers seeking personalized banking services

exposures.sentence: FinTechs continue to emerge in key areas of banking.
